name: Anadama Bread 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: The original recipe called for 1 1/2 T vegetable oil for the large loaf and (1 T) for the smaller loaf. This has been omitted.
2. You could use Wonderslim or possibly applesauce instead of the oil.
3. Add all ingredients in the order suggested by your bread machine manual.
4. Process on the basic bread cycle according to the manufacturer's directions.
5. Let the loaf cool before slicing.
